cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/cache.fk form-stdlib/form-ontology-loader.fk form-stdlib/source-compiler.fk form-stdlib/engine.fk form-stdlib/compiler.fk form-stdlib/grammars/python-bmf.fk form-stdlib/grammars/typescript-bmf.fk form-stdlib/tests/binary-symbol-lens-band.fk

failure_reason: Closed the validation cache race behind the remaining full-suite divergences. Source-section files now compile into unique unpublished temp files before atomically publishing the content-addressed cache artifact, so concurrent suite jobs no longer move each other's output and feed raw section files to the kernels. Concurrent fkwu builds also use unique hidden temp binaries before moving into the shared cache. Focused binary-symbol-lens returns 2320, focused context-domain-media-lens returns 1211, parallel focused validates with a cold fkwu cache both pass, the cold source-compiled cache full suite returned fourth arm: 129 band(s) four-way with 555 ok and 0 divergent before rebase, and the rebased full suite returns fourth arm: 134 band(s) four-way with 555 ok and 0 divergent.
